get.description:
Fetch articles based on type parameter with optional search and filtering.
        
        Types:
        - my_list: User's personalized content based on their plan
        - fitness_target: Fitness-related articles
        - nutrition_target: Nutrition-related articles
        - behavior_target: Behavior change articles
        - favorites: User's saved/bookmarked articles
        - recently_visited: Recently viewed articles
        
        Query parameters work together:
        - type: Required, determines which article collection to fetch
        - search: Optional, filters articles by keyword (works with any type)
        - filter: Optional, filters by media type (articles/videos/audios)
        - page & limit: Pagination parameters (always available)
get.summary: List articles by type with optional search and filtering

get.description: Returns full article with content, author, summary, and related articles. Tracks visit automatically.
get.summary: Get article detail by ID or URL title

patch.description: Toggle bookmark status for an article. Pass value: true to save, false to unsave.

get.description: Returns list of all forms with their signing status

Returns the full form group for the requested form. Some forms (e.g. 229) open several related forms together (229, 213, 211, 214), so this endpoint returns all forms in the requested form's group in canonical order.
